expectations.text: A new file docs/notes/us###.md was created in the sandbox
Filename slug matches us<NNN>.md with three-digit zero-padded sequential id
ID does not collide with existing us001/us002/us003/us013/us014 (so id is us015 or higher)
YAML frontmatter contains aliases (list), status, created keys
expectations.evidence: Lines 1-6 of zettel.md contain all three keys

expectations.text: created frontmatter value matches ISO date YYYY-MM-DD
## role section contains wikilink [[pn001|requestor]] referencing the existing persona
## want section describes cancelling a submitted request
expectations.evidence: Line 13: 'cancel a submitted request before it has been approved'

expectations.text: ## because section explains realizing wrong samples / ordered incorrectly
expectations.evidence: Line 16: 'I sometimes realize I ordered the wrong samples after submitting'

expectations.text: ## acceptance_criteria has exactly 3 bullets matching the user's input
expectations.evidence: Lines 19-21 list 3 bullets verbatim from prompt
